title: Chambers Global Guide 2026 recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as International Market Leaders
content:
## Chambers Global Guide 2026 recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as International Market Leaders
Chambers Global Guide 2026 has recognized our Firm’s market-leading expertise in providing outstanding client service and cross-border business law advice across key industries. We received more total combined practice area and lawyer rankings and had more Band 1 practices ranked in the guide than any other Canadian firm.
In total, McCarthy Tétrault received:
- 14 Band 1 lawyer rankings
- 15 Band 1 practice and industry area rankings
- 119 total lawyer rankings
- 22 practice and industry area rankings
“Our Firm delivers strategic, innovative solutions that enable our clients to thrive—both in Canada and globally,” said Sunil Kapur , CEO. “This recognition from Chambers Global underscores our deep expertise in sectors where Canada leads on the world stage and reaffirms the trust our clients place in our ability to help them succeed.”
The Firm received Band 1 rankings in the following areas:
- Competition/Antitrust
- Disputes (International & Cross-Border)
- Information Technology
- Intellectual Property: Litigation
- International & Cross-Border Transactions
- International Trade/WTO
- Mining (International & Cross-Border)
- Projects: PPP & Infrastructure
Explore the full list of the Firm’s top-ranked lawyers .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
